response:
A business description for a Google My Business profile targeting first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, Florida, can be rewritten as follows:

**Business Description:**  
Established in 2002, Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass is a trusted real estate agency dedicated to providing expert guidance to homeowners and business owners in Orlando and surrounding areas. Our team specializes in helping buyers and sellers navigate the real estate market, offering comprehensive support in all aspects of property transactions and financing. We are committed to building long-term relationships with our clients and ensuring a seamless and reliable real estate experience. Our services are available in key locations including Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, Lake Nona Region, and Lancaster Park – all within central Florida. We operate with a small, dedicated team of real estate professionals who are passionate about serving our community.
